## Analog Devices Underperforms Sector Peers Despite Daily Gain

Relative underperformance on a sector-up day is worth a brief peer-check, but no fundamental signal in the headlines supports a thesis read on ADI.

- ADI posted gains on the day but lagged sector competitors.
- No substantive company news cited.
- Routine relative-performance note only.
